task: Show theatre events for Las Vegas and select one.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating StubHub, setting the location filter to Las Vegas, applying the Theater & Comedy filter, showing Las Vegas theater events, and selecting one. Evidence shows theater listings such as 'The Wizard of Oz at Sphere,' 'The Phantom of the Opera,' and others under the Las Vegas theater/comedy results. The agent then opened 'The Wizard of Oz at Sphere' and further selected a specific performance, reaching the event details/ticket page for 'The Wizard of Oz at Sphere Las Vegas Tickets | May 13, 2026' at Sphere at The Venetian Resort. This satisfies 'Show theatre events for Las Vegas and select one.'
final_result_response:
Done. I’m on the selected event details page:

The Wizard of Oz at Sphere  
Wed, May 13, 2026, 11:00 AM  
Sphere at The Venetian Resort, Las Vegas, Nevada

It shows 113 ticket listings, starting around $103 including fees.
action_history: Opening StubHub: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.stubhub.com/');
Searching Las Vegas location: await page.locator('e246').fill('Las Vegas');
Selecting Las Vegas, NV: await page.locator('e255').click();
Filtering to theater and comedy: await page.locator('e30').click();
Selecting a Las Vegas theater event: await page.locator('e458').click();
Continuing past price notice: await page.locator('e3').click();
Opening tickets for selected event: await page.locator('e23').click();

screenshots.title: Selecting a Las Vegas theater event
